item.buckets_update.bucket.water_only: This bucket can only hold water
advancements.buckets_update.root.title: The Bucket Trade
advancements.buckets_update.root.descrip: Welcome to your first bucket adventure. Choose your path: wood, copper, or iron.
advancements.buckets_update.splash.title: Splish Splash
advancements.buckets_update.splash.descr: Fill a bucket with water — wood or copper.
advancements.buckets_update.old_school.d: Craft an iron bucket — using the revised recipe.
advancements.buckets_update.craft_wooden: Craft a wooden bucket: 3 sticks across the top, 3 planks in a U. Lightweight but breaks after ~16 uses.
advancements.buckets_update.craft_copper: Craft a copper bucket: 3 copper chains across the top, 3 copper ingots in a U. Mid-tier durability — outlasts wood, eventually breaks.
advancements.buckets_update.udder_master: Milk a cow into a wooden or copper bucket.
advancements.buckets_update.last_drop.de: Drink down a milk bucket — wood or copper.
